title: Binomial Distribution: Calculating Mean and Variance
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of calculating the mean (μ) and variance (σ²) for a binomial distribution, starting from its defining parameters and showing the derivation formulas.
elements: Variance Formula: σ² = n * p * (1 - p)
relationships: The parameters n and p are used to calculate the mean
The calculated mean and parameter p are used to calculate the variance
The variance is used to calculate the standard deviation
